frame_eqs_str: a['basstime']=(a['basstime']+(a['bass_att']*0.03)); a['vol']=pow(((a['bass']+a['mid'])+a['treb']), 2); a['basssum']=a['vol']; a['stickybit']=mod(a['time'],2); a['volavg']=(a['volavg']+(a['vol']*equal(a['stickybit'], 1))); a['sample1']=(a['sample1']+equal(a['stickybit'], 1)); a['volavg2']=(a['volavg2']+(a['vol']*equal(a['stickybit'], 0))); a['sample2']=(a['sample2']+equal(a['stickybit'], 0)); a['edge']=bnot(equal(a['bit2'], a['stickybit'])); a['volavg']=(a['volavg']-((a['volavg']*a['edge'])*a['stickybit'])); a['volavg2']=(a['volavg2']-((a['volavg2']*a['edge'])*equal(a['stickybit'], 0))); a['sample1']=(a['sample1']-((a['sample1']*a['edge'])*a['stickybit'])); a['sample2']=(a['sample2']-((a['sample2']*a['edge'])*equal(a['stickybit'], 0))); a['diff']=((Math.abs(equal(a['stickybit'], 1))>0.00001)?((div(a['basssum'],div(a['volavg2'],a['sample2']))*0.03)):(0)); a['diff']=((Math.abs(equal(a['stickybit'], 0))>0.00001)?((div(a['basssum'],div(a['volavg'],a['sample1']))*0.03)):(a['diff'])); a['diff']=a['diff']; a['bit2']=mod(a['time'],2); a['q1']=a['diff']; a['ob_r']=(0.5+(0.5*Math.sin((a['basstime']*4.5)))); a['ob_g']=(0.5+(0.5*Math.sin((a['basstime']*5)))); a['ob_b']=(0.5+(0.5*Math.sin((a['basstime']*3.8)))); a['q2']=a['basstime']; a['state']=(a['state']+above(a['bass_att'], 1.3)); a['state']=((Math.abs(above(a['state'], 1))>0.00001)?(0):(a['state'])); a['xs']=((Math.abs(below(a['xs'], 1))>0.00001)?(5):(a['xs'])); a['ys']=((Math.abs(below(a['xs'], 1))>0.00001)?(5):(a['ys'])); a['xs']=((a['xs']+((equal(a['state'], 0)*Math.cos((a['basstime']*1.2)))*a['diff']))+((equal(a['state'], 1)*Math.sin(((a['basstime']*1.5)+1)))*a['diff'])); a['ys']=((a['xs']+((equal(a['state'], 0)*Math.cos(((a['basstime']*1.45)+0.3)))*a['diff']))+((equal(a['state'], 1)*Math.sin((a['basstime']*1.05)))*a['diff'])); a['q3']=(0.5+(0.5*Math.sin((a['xs']*2)))); a['q4']=(0.5+(0.5*Math.sin((a['ys']*2.1)))); a['echo_orient']=3;
